mapper.select:
SELECT t.id AS ticketId, o.id AS orderId, o.order_number AS orderNumber, oi.product_name AS productName, o.ordered_at AS orderedAt, oi.unit_price AS unitPrice, CAST(oi.unit_price * (100 - COALESCE(p.commission_rate, 0)) / 100.0 AS INTEGER) AS supplyPrice, oic.coupon_number AS couponNumber, COALESCE(TO_CHAR(tcg.valid_from, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_CHAR(pr.sales_start_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) AS validFrom, COALESCE(TO_CHAR(tcg.valid_until, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_CHAR(pr.sales_end_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD')) AS validTo, p.name AS partnerName, o.customer_name AS customerName, o.customer_phone AS customerPhone, o.paid_at AS ticketSentDate, t.ticket_used_date AS ticketUsedDate, o.canceled_at AS canceledAt, CASE WHEN o.status IN ('CANCELED', 'REFUNDED') THEN '취소' WHEN t.ticket_used = true THEN '사용완료' WHEN pr.sales_end_date IS NOT NULL AND pr.sales_end_date < CURRENT_DATE THEN '기간만료' ELSE '사용가능' END AS ticketStatus, CASE WHEN o.status IN ('CANCELED', 'REFUNDED') THEN o.canceled_at WHEN t.ticket_used = true THEN t.ticket_used_date ELSE NULL END AS processedAt FROM order_tickets t JOIN order_items oi ON oi.id = t.order_item_id JOIN orders o ON o.id = oi.order_id JOIN products pr ON pr.id = oi.product_id LEFT JOIN partners p ON p.id = pr.partner_id LEFT JOIN order_item_coupons oic ON oic.order_item_id = oi.id LEFT JOIN ticket_coupons tc ON tc.id = oic.coupon_id LEFT JOIN ticket_coupon_groups tcg ON tcg.id = tc.group_id WHERE 1 = 1 AND pr.partner_id = #{partnerId} AND o.status != 'PENDING_PAYMENT'
AND ( Upper(o.order_number) LIKE '%' || Upper(#{srchWord}) || '%' OR Upper(o.customer_name) LIKE '%' || Upper(#{srchWord}) || '%' OR Upper(oi.product_name) LIKE '%' || Upper(#{srchWord}) || '%' OR Upper(oic.coupon_number) LIKE '%' || Upper(#{srchWord}) || '%' )
AND Date(o.ordered_at) >= #{begDate}
AND Date(o.ordered_at) <= #{endDate}
AND t.ticket_used = true AND o.status NOT IN ('CANCELED', 'REFUNDED')
AND t.ticket_used = false AND o.status NOT IN ('CANCELED', 'REFUNDED') AND (pr.sales_end_date IS NULL OR pr.sales_end_date >= CURRENT_DATE)
AND o.status IN ('CANCELED', 'REFUNDED')
AND t.ticket_used = false AND o.status NOT IN ('CANCELED', 'REFUNDED')
AND pr.sales_end_date IS NOT NULL AND pr.sales_end_date < CURRENT_DATE
ORDER BY o.ordered_at DESC, t.created_at DESC

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT o.id) AS totalOrderCnt, COUNT(t.id) AS totalTicketCnt, COALESCE(SUM(oi.unit_price), 0) AS totalSalesPrice, COALESCE(SUM(CAST(oi.unit_price * (100 - COALESCE(p.commission_rate, 0)) / 100.0 AS INTEGER)), 0) AS totalSupplyPrice FROM order_tickets t JOIN order_items oi ON oi.id = t.order_item_id JOIN orders o ON o.id = oi.order_id JOIN products pr ON pr.id = oi.product_id LEFT JOIN partners p ON p.id = pr.partner_id WHERE 1 = 1 AND pr.partner_id = #{partnerId} AND o.status != 'PENDING_PAYMENT'
AND Date(o.ordered_at) >= #{begDate}
AND Date(o.ordered_at) <= #{endDate}
AND t.ticket_used = true AND o.status NOT IN ('CANCELED', 'REFUNDED')
AND t.ticket_used = false AND o.status NOT IN ('CANCELED', 'REFUNDED') AND (pr.sales_end_date IS NULL OR pr.sales_end_date >= CURRENT_DATE)
AND o.status IN ('CANCELED', 'REFUNDED')
AND t.ticket_used = false AND o.status NOT IN ('CANCELED', 'REFUNDED')
AND pr.sales_end_date IS NOT NULL AND pr.sales_end_date < CURRENT_DATE
